title: danais xanthorrhoea
intro: Danais xanthorrhoea, commonly known as the yellow gentian or wild gentian, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. The medicinal properties of Danais xanthorrhoea lie in its roots, which contain gentiopicroside, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of Danais xanthorrhoea include infusions and decoctions made from the roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
